zh.lifeSummary: 當Luigia Di Ceva於1240年出生在義大利皮蒙特辛塞瓦時，她的父親Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva30歲，母親Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este30歲。她於1258年與Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1291年8月22日在義大利皮蒙特享年51歲，埋葬在義大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Luigia Di Ceva于1240年出生在意大利皮蒙特辛塞瓦时，她的父亲Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva30岁，母亲Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este30岁。她于1258年与Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1291年8月22日在意大利皮蒙特享年51岁，埋葬在意大利皮蒙特辛雷福洛。

nameMeanings.name: Di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Ceva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Mario, Alberto, Alicia, Armando, Consuela, Eugenio, Imelda, Javier, Jorge, Juan, Juana, Juanito.  Italian Geno, Gino, Pasquale, Salvatore.
Italian and Spanish: probably a nickname from cena ‘supper’.
Italian: possibly also a topographic name ultimately derived from Latin caenum ‘mud’.

variants.name: Decena
meanings: Spanish: probably a variant of Cena , with fused preposition de ‘of’. This surname is most common in the Philippines and the Dominican Republic.

variants.name: Husain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Syed, Mohammed, Iqbal, Akhtar, Ali, Bibi, Ishrat, Mohammad, Nasir, Abid, Arif, Arshad.

Muslim: from the Arabic personal name Ḥusayn, a diminutive of Ḥasan ‘good, handsome’ (see Hasan ). Husain (c. 626–680) and his elder brother Hasan were sons of the caliph ʿAlī ibn Abī Ṭālib (see Ali ) and, through their mother Fatima, grandsons of the prophet Muhammad. The death of Husain in a massacre at Karbala signaled the beginning of a long period of internecine strife in the Muslim world. Shiite Muslims regard Hasan and his brother Husain as the true successors of Muhammad, and observe the day of his death as a day of mourning. The name is popular among Sunni Muslims as well as Shiites. Compare Husein , Hussein , and Hossein .

nameMeanings.name: Luigia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Apparently a shortened form of Eligia, the feminine form of Eligio ( see Eloy ).

en.lifeSummary: When Luigia Di Ceva was born in 1240, in Ceva, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, her father, Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva, was 30 and her mother, Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este, was 30. She married Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo in 1258. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 22 August 1291, in Piedmont, Italy, at the age of 51, and was buried in Revello, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Luigia Di Ceva est née en 1240, à Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo en 1258. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 août 1291, à Piemonte, Italie, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Luigia Di Ceva 1240 in Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva 30 und ihre Mutter Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este 30. Sie hat 1258 Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. August 1291 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Piemonte, Italien und wurde in Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Luigia Di Ceva è nata il nel 1240 nel Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, sua padre, Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo nel 1258. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 22 agosto 1291, nel Piemonte, Italia, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Luigia Di Cevaが1240年にイタリアピエモントクウネオセヴァで生まれた時，父Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Cevaは30歳，母Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Esteは30歳であった。1258年にThomas I Marquess of Saluzzoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1291年8月22日にイタリアピエモントで51歳で死去し，イタリアピエモントクウネオレベロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Luigia Di Ceva(이)가 1240년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 세바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1258년 Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1291년 8월 22일 이탈리아 피몽에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 러에벨로에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Luigia Di Ceva nasceu em 1240, em Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo em 1258. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de agosto de 1291, em Piemonte, Itália, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Luigia Di Ceva родилась в 1240 г. в местности кева, кунео, пиемонт, Италия, её отцу по имени Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo в 1258 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 22 августа 1291 г. в местности пиемонт, Италия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности ривеллоу, кунео, пиемонт, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Luigia Di Ceva nació en 1240, en Ceva, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Giorgio II 'Nano' del Vasto Marquis of Ceva, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elisa Alessine Menzia d'Este, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Thomas I Marquess of Saluzzo en 1258. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 22 de agosto de 1291, en Piemonte, Italia, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Revello, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia.
